content:
===center
[[symbol:u]][[symbol:b]][[symbol:g]] ~~***THE WISE MOTHMAN***~~ [[symbol:u]][[symbol:b]][[symbol:g]]
===endcenter
===center
*~~**A Gentle And Caring Lover**~~*
===endcenter
===center
Wise and holy Mothman, watch over us in our time of trials. 
===endcenter
===center
![My Favorite GIF](https://media1.tenor.com/m/h_-54nlGaIYAAAAd/mothman-tv.gif)
===endcenter
===center
[BUG Food Chain & Mill Discord](https://discord.gg/fJvvVwc8dJ)
===endcenter
===accordion
===panel: Overview
===accordion
===panel:  What Is A Gentle And Caring Lover?
* A Gentle And Caring Lover is a fast layered combo deck that seeks to use [[Demonic Consultation]] or [[Tainted Pact]] as one card combos with [[The Wise Mothman]].
* This deck uses [[Thassa's Oracle]] and [[Displacer Kitten]] combos as layered back up combos to the [[Food Chain]] main gameplan.
===endpanel
===endaccordion
===accordion
===panel: Why Play The Wise Mothman Over Other Food Chain Decks?
* The decks greatest strength is its flexibility of being able to still go for win attempts through opponents [[The One Ring]].
* [[The Wise Mothman]] has unique interactions with the mechanic of "Committing A Crime" as well as cards such as [[Cephalid Illusionist]] and [[Emperor of Bones]].
* The [[symbol:u]][[symbol:b]][[symbol:g]] color combination allows for the win condition to be in the command zone unlike decks such as [[Atraxa, Grand Unifier]] or [[The First Sliver]].
* You are a follower of the Cult of the Mothman
===endpanel
===endaccordion
===accordion
===panel: What The Weaknesses Of A Gentle And Caring Lover?
* When you give all of your opponents [[Radiation]], you also give your self the same amount of [[Radiation]].
* In order to win through [[Radiation]], you must pass the turn to your opponents and they will have a small window to either win the game or not lose at instant speed in their main phases'. If they would have cards such as [[Angel's Grace]], [[Borne Upon a Wind]], [[Demonic Consultation]], or [[Tainted Pact]] this could lead to one of your opponents to win the game instead.
===endpanel
===endaccordion
===endpanel
===endaccordion
===accordion
===panel: Gameplan

===endpanel
===endaccordion
===accordion
===panel: Combos & Wincons
===accordion
===panel: Thassa's Oracle 
===center
![My Favorite GIF](https://static1.thegamerimages.com/wordpress/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/thassa-s-oracle-combo.jpg)
===endcenter[[symbol:u]][[symbol:u]][[symbol:b]] / [[symbol:1]][[symbol:u]][[symbol:u]][[symbol:b]]:

Cast [[Thassa's Oracle]] hold priority on the ETB cast either [[Demonic Consultation]] naming [[The Most Dangerous Gamer]], or [[Tainted Pact]].
===endpanel
===endaccordion
===accordion
===panel: Food Chain & Eternal Scourge
===center
![My Favorite GIF](https://cards.scryfall.io/art_crop/front/3/c/3c357295-4d5f-40f7-81e8-ae0a463df28b.jpg?1678945269)
===endcenter
[[symbol:2]][[symbol:g]] + Any creature with mana value of at least [[symbol:2]]:

 Cast [[Food Chain]], activate [[Food Chain]] sacrificing any creature with mana value of [[symbol:2]] or greater. Cast [[Eternal Scourge]], activate [[Food Chain]] generating [[symbol:infinity-u]][[symbol:infinity-b]][[symbol:infinity-g]] for creature spells. Cast [[The Wise Mothman]] until you give your opponents enough [[Radiation]] to ghoulify them.
* Note that your opponents won't lose until their precombat main phases. If they have [[Borne Upon A Wind]], another way to win at instant speed, [[Tainted Pact]], [[Demonic Consultation]], or another way of emptying their deck you could still lose instead. 
===endpanel
===endaccordion
===accordion
===panel: Food Chain & Misthollow Griffin
===center
![My Favorite GIF](https://cards.scryfall.io/art_crop/front/2/d/2db4fe28-e580-479b-910f-b719d69468b1.jpg?1592708649)
===endcenter
[[symbol:2]][[symbol:g]] + Any Creature with mana value of at least [[symbol:3]]:

Cast [[Food Chain]], activate [[Food Chain]] sacrificing any creature with mana value of [[symbol:3]] or greater. Cast [[Misthollow Griffin]] Generating [[symbol:infinity-u]] for creature spells. Filter the [[symbol:infinity-u]] into [[symbol:infinity-u]][[symbol:infinity-b]][[symbol:infinity-g]] for creature spells. Cast [[The Wise Mothman]] until you give your opponents enough [[Radiation]] to ghoulify them.
* Note that your opponents won't lose until their precombat main phases. If they have [[Borne Upon A Wind]], another way to win at instant speed, [[Tainted Pact]], [[Demonic Consultation]], or another way of emptying their deck you could still lose instead. 
===endpanel
===endaccordion

===accordion
===panel: Culling Betrayal
![My Favorite GIF](https://cdna.artstation.com/p/assets/images/images/036/453/886/large/lorenzo-mastroianni-culling.jpg?1617725314)
[[symbol:2]][[symbol:u]][[symbol:b]][[symbol:g]]:

Cast [[Culling Ritual]], leaving you with [[symbol:u]] destroying each nonland permanent with mana value [[symbol:2]] or less. Generate a large amount of [[symbol:b]] / [[symbol:g]], use [[symbol:u]][[symbol:b]][[symbol:g]] to cast [[Mnemonic Betrayal]] to use your opponents graveyards to put a win together.

===endpanel
===endaccordion

===accordion
===panel: Mothman O's
[[symbol:2]][[symbol:u]][[symbol:u]][[symbol:b]][[symbol:g]]:

Cast [[The Wise Mothman]] & [[Cephalid Illusionist]]. Target [[Cephalid Illusionist]] with any spell or ability, triggering [[The Wise Mothman]] targeting [[Cephalid Illusionist]], triggering [[Cephalid Illusionist]] to mill 3 cards. If you did not mill 3 lands you will trigger [[The Wise Mothman]], be sure to have [[Cephalid Illusionist]] be one of the targets. You will be able to repeat this until either you mill 3 lands, mill your entire deck, or don't target [[Cephalid Illusionist]].
* [[Dread Return]] / [[Emperor of Bones]] / [[Praetor's Grasp]] / [[Reanimate]] / [[Six]] can be used to get [[Thassa's Oracle]] after your deck is empty.

===endpanel
===endaccordion
===accordion
===panel: Intuition Line 
[[symbol:4]][[symbol:u]][[symbol:gp]][[symbol:g]][[symbol:g]]:

Cast [[Intuition]]. Search your library for [[Shifting Woodland]], [[Noxious Revival]], and any nonland permanent that you wish to cast. Regardless of the decision the opponent makes on which card to give you, you'll get the desired nonland permanent.
* Though this line can be mana intensive, [[Intuition]] being an instant allows you to cast in an opponents end step.
* [[Food Chain]] or [[Survival of the Fittest]] are the usual targets when attempting to win.
* Don't forget to avoid targeting a green player in attempt to avoid [[Veil of Summer]]
===endpanel
===endaccordion

===accordion

===panel: Emperor of the Fittest 
[[symbol:4]][[symbol:u]][[symbol:b]][[symbol:b]][[symbol:g]][[symbol:g]][[symbol:g]][[symbol:g]] and any creature in hand:
 
Cast [[Survival of the fittest]]. Activate [[Survival of the fittest]] discarding any creature in your hand, search your library for [[Hoarding Broodlord]]. Activate [[Survival of the fittest]] discarding the [[Hoarding Broodlord]], seach your library for [[Emperor of Bones]]. Cast the [[Emperor of Bones]]. Move to combat and exile the [[Hoarding Broodlord]] with the [[Emperor of Bones]]' ability. Spend [[symbol:1]][[symbol:b]] to adapt the [[Emperor of Bones]], animating [[Hoarding Broodlord]]. Search your library for [[Essence Flux]] off of the [[Hoarding Broodlord]] enters ability. Cast the [[Essence Flux]] targeting [[Hoarding Broodlord]], search your library for [[Saw in Half]] off of [[Hoarding Broodlord]] entering. Cast [[Saw in Half]] targeting [[Hoarding Broodlord]] distorying the one in play, giving you two token copies. When the token copies enter, search for [[Food Chain]] and [[Eternal Scourge]]. Cast [[Food Chain]] exiling one of the token copies of [[Hoarding Broodlord]] to [[Food Chain]] to cast [[Eternal Scourge]]. From there you can generate [[symbol:infinity-u]][[symbol:infinity-b]][[symbol:infinity-g]] for creatures and cast [[The Wise Mothman]] over and over until the table has enough [[Radiation]] to win.

* Though this line is the most mana intensive of all the lines in the deck, it can be broken up over 2 turns as well as using creatures in play to convoke out the spells searched for by [[Hoarding Broodlord]]. If you cast [[Survival of the Fittest]] on a previous turn as well as convoke you can get the total cost on the winning turn down to [[symbol:2]][[symbol:u]][[symbol:b]][[symbol:b]][[symbol:g]][[symbol:g]].
===endpanel
===endaccordion

===accordion
===panel: A Frog and A Faerie Walk Into A Bar
[[symbol:4]][[symbol:u]][[symbol:u]][[symbol:g]] + a creature in play + [[Gaea's Cradle]]:

Cast [[Lilysplash Mentor]] and [[Cloud of Faeries]]. [[Cloud of Faeries]] enters and untaps [[Gaea's Cradle]] plus a [[symbol:u]] producing land. Tap [[Gaea's Cradle]] alongside your [[symbol:u]] land producing [[symbol:u]][[symbol:g]][[symbol:g]][[symbol:g]]. Activate [[Lilysplash Mentor]] targeting [[Cloud of Faeries]] leaving you with [[symbol:g]] leftover. [[Cloud of Faereis]] enters and untaps your [[symbol:u]] land and [[Gaea's Cradle]]. Repeat this until you generate [[symbol:infinity-g]]. Filter the [[symbol:infinity-g]] into [[symbol:infinity-u]][[symbol:infinity-b]][[symbol:infinity-g]]. 
* Once you Generate [[symbol:infinity-u]][[symbol:infinity-b]][[symbol:infinity-g]] you can with through infinite flickering of [[The Wise Mothman]] / [[Orcish Bowmasters]] or casting a very large [[Finale of Devastation]] 
===endpanel
===endaccordion

===accordion
===panel: Grasping for Straws
[[symbol:1]][[symbol:b]][[symbol:b]][[symbol:b]][[symbol:u]][[symbol:u]]/[[symbol:2]][[symbol:b]][[symbol:b]][[symbol:b]][[symbol:u]][[symbol:u]]:

Cast [[Praetor's Grasp]] targeting an opponent you suspect has the missing piece to your combo still in their library. Search their library for [[Demonic Consultation]] / [[Tainted Pact]] / [[Thassa's Oracle]]. Cast [[Thassa's Oracle]] hold priority on the enters ability and cast [[Demonic Consultation]] ( be sure to name [[The Most Dangerous Gamer]] ) or cast [[Tainted Pact]]. Exile your library and win the game.
* One of the more risky lines in the list due to the randomness of if the opponent you target has your missing combo piece or not.
* Be wary of [[Veil of Summer]], since the player you may have to target could be playing [[symbol:g]].


===endpanel
===endaccordion
===endpanel
===endaccordion
===accordion
===panel: Mulligans
===accordion
===panel: First Seven:
**Seat Order:**
1. [[ Tymna the Weaver]] & [[Kraum, Ludevic's Opus]]
2. [[Rograkh, Son of Rohgahh]] & [[Silas Renn, Seeker Adept]]
3. [[Kinnan, Bonder Prodigy]]
4. [[The Wise Mothman]]
![My Favorite GIF](https://i.imgur.com/evNBbFz.png)

===endpanel
===endaccordion

===accordion
===panel: Mulligan to Six:
**Seat Order:**
1. [[Thrasios, Triton Hero]] & [[Tymna the Weaver]]
1. [[The Wise Mothman]]
1. [[Sisay, Weatherlight Captain]]
1. [[Tivit, Seller of Secrets]]
![My Favorite GIF](https://i.imgur.com/gM5ZOka.png)

===endpanel
===endaccordion

===accordion
===panel: First Seven:
**Seat Order:**
1. [[Rograkh, Son of Rohgahh]] & [[Silas Renn, Seeker Adept]]
1. [[ Tymna the Weaver]] & [[Kraum, Ludevic's Opus]]
1. [[Thrasios, Triton Hero]] & [[Tymna the Weaver]]
1. [[The Wise Mothman]]

![My Favorite GIF](https://i.imgur.com/1ef6fXz.png)
===endpanel
===endaccordion
===accordion
===panel: Second Seven:
**Seat Order:**
1.  [[Sisay, Weatherlight Captain]]
1. [[Kinnan, Bonder Prodigy]]
1. [[The Wise Mothman]]
1. [[Rograkh, Son of Rohgahh]] & [[Silas Renn, Seeker Adept]]
![My Favorite GIF](https://i.imgur.com/DESGFrq.png)

===endpanel
===endaccordion
===accordion
===panel: First Seven:
**Seat Order:**
1. [[Tivit, Seller of Secrets]]
1. [[The Wise Mothman]]
1.  [[Thrasios, Triton Hero]] & [[Tymna the Weaver]]
1. [[Sisay, Weatherlight Captain]]
![My Favorite GIF](https://i.imgur.com/zIZKR5g.png)

===endpanel
===endaccordion
===endpanel
===endaccordion
